raw: aunt indi-kegid un ain bess (mother's side)
cut seergi cosor seerka kerb (cut hair)
drop digir,diff nuddikir,tif (drop on the floor)
face abidi teerin ( to face, to meet)
fine nere,moroad noroad (soft to the touch)
head owrou owrou (head of the tribe)
inflated ouff-bou ouffa feen gouff afeen
yes hoy hoy (to answer a calling)
